// copilot-dev-kit: VS Code Copilot settings. Merge into your repo's .vscode/settings.json. codeGeneration/testGeneration .instructions settings are DEPRECATED (VS Code 1.102+) — use .github/instructions/*.instructions.md instead. The three below are still active.

github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Conventional-commit style. Subject ≤72 chars, imperative mood. Body explains WHY, not just what. Never include secrets or tokens.

github.copilot.chat.reviewSelection.inst.text: Review adversarially: try to BREAK the code — edge cases, race conditions, failure branches, contract drift, unvalidated input, hardcoded secrets. Order findings by severity. Do not fabricate; flag what you could not verify.

github.copilot.chat.pullRequestDescripti.text: Summarize WHAT changed and WHY. List how it was verified (real-data/spec proof, tests, failure-branch coverage). Call out any evidence still outstanding. No secrets.
